a1.title: Big win against Prishtina
a1.content: FC Malisheva won 3-1 against Prishtina in their latest match.

a2.title: Player of the week: Albin Rama
a2.content: Albin Rama was named player of the week after his outstanding performance.

a3.title: Preparation for Conference League
a3.content: The team is preparing for the important Conference League match this week.

gallery.title: FC Malisheva's Best Moments
gallery.subtitle: Browse official photos of the team, bench and fans. Here you'll find the feeling of the stadium and the visual history of the club.

history.title: FC Malisheva's Journey and Fans
history.subtitle: An overview of the club's history and the unwavering support of the fans who have built FC Malisheva's identity.
history.clubText1: FC Malisheva has built an excellent journey in Kosovo football. With extraordinary dedication and great sacrifices, the club has achieved significant successes in the Superliga and is preparing for the Conference League challenge.
history.clubText2: Recent seasons have marked performance improvements across every category: the team, staff and club structures.
history.fansText1: FC Malisheva's fans have a long and passionate history. With a strong culture of unity and support for the team, the fans have become one of the key elements of the club's identity.
history.fansText2: Shoulder to shoulder at every match, they create a unique atmosphere and support the team at every step of the journey towards success.
